message_summary: Lead sent a compact Prompt B request asking the existing art/visual thread to produce a structured M7-VISUAL-UX-HANDOFF-001 Markdown handoff. The request preserved M7 authority, M7 content-lock status, no M5/M6 rollback, no UI implementation, no new major systems, and DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE.

required_target_output.format: structured Markdown plus concise JSON-like summary
required_target_output.requested_action: systems_architect + client_engineer + qa_reviewer review and convert into M7 UI/localization tasks

required_sections: Mapping from concept art to current systems
non_goals: server, multiplayer, telemetry, cloud-save, paid service, account, or secret integration
repo file modification by the art thread without explicit authorization
